query:
INSERT INTO grant_opportunities (name, funderName, funderType, minAmount, maxAmount, typicalAmount, eligibleEntityTypes, eligibilityRequirements, geographicRestrictions, focusAreas, description, applicationDeadline, isRolling, applicationUrl, status, priority, notes, addedBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'Amber Grant for Women',
  'WomensNet',
  'foundation',
  10000.00,
  50000.00,
  10000.00,
  '["llc", "sole_proprietor", "nonprofit"]',
  'Open to women (18+) who own at least 50% of a business in US or Canada. Pre-revenue startups and established businesses eligible.',
  'United States, Canada',
  '["women_owned", "small_business", "entrepreneurship"]',
  'Monthly $10,000 grants to women-owned businesses. Winners eligible for $50,000 year-end grant. $15 application fee.',
  '2026-01-31 23:59:59',
  0,
  'https://ambergrantsforwomen.com/get-an-amber-grant/apply-now/',
  'submitted',
  'high',
  'Applied Jan 19, 2026. Receipt #1532-9613. $15 fee paid via VISA-7274.',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
